name: Multilevel Pricing
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": This add-on is only compatible with the Neto webstore sales channel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Multi-level pricing lets you to offer discounts per product based on the number of items a customer purchases on a single order. Multi-level discounts are automatically applied. Example of multi-level pricing:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Buy 1-10 Pay $50 each"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Buy 11-20 Pay $45 each"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Buy 21 or more Pay $40 each"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Multilevel pricing discounts are ignored if a better price promotion is in effect."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Multilevel Pricing Add-on"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel, click on the "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Product Management section, find the Multilevel pricing add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button in the pop-up that appears. Once installed, click the "}, {"text": "Close", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When installed, a "}, {"text": "Multilevel Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " section will appear for each product in your control panel."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you don't see the Multilevel Pricing section click the "}, {"text": "Customise Layout", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page and enable it."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add Multilevel Pricing to Products"}], "data-id": "setup-multi-level-pricing"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Variation products require the multilevel pricing to be applied to the child products, not the parent products."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products > View All Products", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the product you want to add multilevel pricing to."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to "}, {"text": "Multilevel Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": " section (just after "}, {"text": "Pricing & Tax", "italic": true}, {"text": ")."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you don't see the price groups, click on the "}, {"text": "Show All", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Add new band", "bold": true}, {"text": " under the price group you want to add the multi-level pricing."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a minimum and maximum order quantity and then the price for this level."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "A blank or 0 value in the maximum quantity field sets the amount to infinite. This should only be used on the highest quantity tier."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Repeat adding bands as needed."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now enter different pricing for each price group."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you have the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "Customer Groups"}]}, {"text": " turned on, you can click on the "}, {"text": "Show All", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to display the other pricing groups."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save changes."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Multilevel Pricing"}], "data-id": "3"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can import multi-level pricing using the import system. Import the SKU of a product and the following string:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "usergroup#:[min-qty]-[max-qty]=[price],usergroup#:[min-qty]-[max-qty]=[price],usergroup#:[min-qty]-[max-qty]=[price],"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "e.g."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1:0-6=12.00,1:6-15=13.00,1:15-20=10.00,"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Each price break is comma separated."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
